esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-influxdb.otel-*
// Shard write error counters (cumulative)
| WHERE COALESCE(metrics.storage_shard_write_err_count, storage_shard_write_err_count) IS NOT NULL
    OR COALESCE(metrics.storage_shard_write_err_sum, storage_shard_write_err_sum) IS NOT NULL
// Detect increase in errors over the window, by host and shard
| STATS min_count = MIN(COALESCE(metrics.storage_shard_write_err_count, storage_shard_write_err_count)),
    max_count = MAX(COALESCE(metrics.storage_shard_write_err_count, storage_shard_write_err_count)),
    min_sum = MIN(COALESCE(metrics.storage_shard_write_err_sum, storage_shard_write_err_sum)),
    max_sum = MAX(COALESCE(metrics.storage_shard_write_err_sum, storage_shard_write_err_sum))
  BY host.name, COALESCE(attributes.id, attributes.bucket, "default")
| EVAL count_increase = max_count - min_count,
    sum_increase = max_sum - min_sum
// Alert when any new shard write errors occurred
| WHERE count_increase > 0 OR sum_increase > 0
